blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Meadows is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 10 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,844 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.5" of snow, highs of 38°F, winds around 25 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow. Models disagree — check back.

recent_conditions.narrative: 34.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 8" over the past week. Current depth: 48".
